name: OpenClaw Memory Plugin
description: OpenClaw memory plugin for multi-agent memory management. Provides save, load, search, and sync capabilities for agent memories.

MEMORY_MAIN_REPO_URL.description: URL of the main memory repository

MEMORY_BUSINESS_REPO_URL.description: URL of the business memory repository

MEMORY_CODE_REPO_URL.description: URL of the code memory repository

MEMORY_PRIVATE_REPO_URL.description: URL of the private memory repository

MEMORY_LOCAL_PATH.description: Local path for memory storage (env var)

MEMORY_AGENT_NAME.description: Agent identifier for private repo naming
